diary_entries.entry: The equipment_failure changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.
Population: 35. Critical equipment malfunction. I spent the year on prayer. Closest to Selene-1.
The equipment_failure changed everything. I feel pragmatic about our future here.

meta_awareness: Titan (year 81): 'Three levels of simulation deep and the colonists at the bottom still argue about rations. The pattern repeats at every scale.'
